title: SyrupSMP Official Modpack
description: Play SyrupSMP the way it’s meant to be — curated mods for chill survival, community fun, and waffle-fueled nights.
body:
## 🧇 SyrupSMP Official Modpack

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1222208614576554016?color=%237289DA&label=Join%20Us%20on%20Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/tTncUGhx5T)
![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.6-62b47a?logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)
![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-3fb9c2?logo=fabric&logoColor=white)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green)

**Welcome to the SyrupSMP — our cozy, community-first Minecraft server modpack.**
This pack brings smooth performance, quality-of-life tweaks, and a sprinkle of visual sweetness to your vanilla adventures, so you can focus on building, exploring, and making friends.


### ✨ **What’s Inside?**

This lightweight pack is built for **Minecraft 1.21.6 (Fabric)** and comes loaded with **performance boosts**, **QoL improvements**, **visual upgrades**, and **community-friendly features**, including:

* **Optimizations & Smooth Performance:**
  *Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, More Culling* — to keep your FPS high and your PC happy.

* **Beautiful Visuals & Shaders:**
  *Iris Shaders, LambDynamicLights, Visuality, Blur+, OptiGUI, Sound Physics Remastered* — make your world feel alive (shaders are optional if your PC needs a break).

* **Better HUD & Interface:**
  *BetterF3, MiniHUD, Inventory HUD+, Better Mount HUD, Xaero’s Minimap & World Map* — more info at a glance, when you need it.

* **Smoother Building:**
  *Litematica, Tweakeroo, Model Gap Fix, Shulker Box Tooltip* — plan, tweak, and organize your builds with ease.

* **Enhanced Chat & Social:**
  *Chat Heads, Chat Patches, Emoji Type, Simple Voice Chat, CraftPresence* — stay connected, vibe together.

* **Comfort & Convenience:**
  *AppleSkin, Inventory Profiles Next, FastQuit, Freecam, Debugify, Dynamic FPS, Cubes Without Borders* — small changes, big comfort.

…and **many more tweaks** — like capes, controller support, animated textures, better culling, and more. We’ve customized configs, bundled recommended shaders & resource packs, and tested it all so you don’t have to.


### 🫧 **How It Works**

✅ **You *don’t* need this modpack to join the server — it’s fully optional!**
But we recommend it for the best SyrupSMP experience — extra cozy, smooth, and just a little bit fancier.

📌 **Play solo or together:** You can use this pack for singleplayer too — but we’d love to see you in our Discord!
📅 **Season-based:** SyrupSMP runs in 8-month-long seasons. We keep the modpack updated along the way.


### 🎉 **Join the Community**

**🔗 [Join our Discord!](https://discord.gg/tTncUGhx5T)** — make friends, get server info, and be part of the SyrupSMP family.


## 🍁 **Stay cozy. Stay syrupy. See you in-game!**

<details>
<summary>✨ Click to view shaders & resource packs</summary>

**Shaders**
- **[Complementary Shaders - Unbound:](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)** Gorgeous, flexible shaders with great performance.

**Resource Packs**
- **[Recolourful Containers GUI + HUD:](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui)** Fresh, colorful visuals for your containers and HUD.
- **[Translations for Sodium:](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translations-for-sodium)** Adds missing language files for Sodium.
- **[VanillaTweaks:](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)** Small vanilla tweaks for a cleaner look.
- **[Enchanted Covers:](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchanted-covers)** Adds unique custom textures to enchanted books
- **[Stefan's Enchanted Books:](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stefansenchantedbooks)** Gives each enchanted book a distinct, detailed texture

</details>

<details>
<summary>📜 Click to view full mod list</summary>

- **[[EMF] Entity Model Features:](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** Adds support for OptiFine's Custom Entity Models (CEM)  
- **[[ETF] Entity Texture Features:](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** Adds new entity & player skin texture features  
- **[3D Skin Layer:](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)** Makes player skins’ second layer fully 3D  
- **[Animatica:](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)** Loads MCPatcher/OptiFine animated textures  
- **[AppleSkin:](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)** Improves food HUD info  
- **[Better Mount HUD:](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud)** Better HUD when riding mounts  
- **[Better Third Person:](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person)** Improves the third-person camera view with smoother angles and controls
- **[BetterF3:](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)** Customizable debug HUD  
- **[Blur+:](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus)** Blurs background when in menus  
- **[Bobby:](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)** Lets you render beyond server view distance  
- **[Capes:](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)** Use capes from Optifine, LabyMod, MinecraftCapes  
- **[Chat Heads:](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)** Shows player heads in chat  
- **[Chat Patches:](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches)** Improves Minecraft’s chat features  
- **[Cherished Worlds:](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds)** Pin/bookmark worlds  
- **[Cloth Config API:](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)** Config screens library
- **[Continuity:](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)** Adds efficient connected textures and seamless glass for a prettier world
- **[Controlify:](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify)** Adds controller support  
- **[CraftPresence:](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftpresence)** Discord Rich Presence customization  
- **[Cubes Without Borders:](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders)** Borderless fullscreen  
- **[Debugify:](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)** Fixes 70+ Mojang bugs  
- **[Dynamic FPS:](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)** Saves resources when idle or backgrounded  
- **[Emoji Type:](https://modrinth.com/mod/emoji-type)** Type emojis/symbols easily  
- **[Entity Culling:](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)** Smarter rendering for visible entities  
- **[Fabric API:](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** Core Fabric hooks  
- **[Fabric Language Kotlin:](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)** Kotlin support for Fabric  
- **[FastQuit:](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit)** Return to title screen faster  
- **[FerriteCore:](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)** Reduces memory usage  
- **[Forge Config API Port:](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)** Cross-ecosystem config library  
- **[Freecam:](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam)** Control camera freely (e.g. for building)  
- **[ImmediatelyFast:](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)** Faster GPU rendering  
- **[Inventory Profiles Next:](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)** Auto-sort, swap tools, chest dump  
- **[Inventory HUD+:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge)** Shows inventory on-screen  
- **[Iris Shaders:](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)** Modern shader loader  
- **[LambDynamicLights:](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)** Dynamic lights  
- **[Language Reload:](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)** QoL for language packs  
- **[libIPN:](https://modrinth.com/mod/libipn)** Library for Inventory Profiles Next  
- **[Litematica:](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)** Modern schematics mod  
- **[Lithium:](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)** General performance mod  
- **[Main Menu Credits:](https://modrinth.com/mod/main-menu-credits)** Add info to title screen  
- **[MaLiLib:](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib)** Library for client mods  
- **[MiniHUD:](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud)** “Mini F3” HUD, overlays  
- **[MixinTrace:](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixintrace)** Debug mixins in crash reports  
- **[Mod Menu:](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** See installed mods in-game  
- **[Model Gap Fix:](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)** Fixes block/item model gaps  
- **[More Chat History:](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)** Longer chat history  
- **[More Culling:](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)** More rendering performance tweaks  
- **[OptiGUI:](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)** Custom in-game GUI textures  
- **[Puzzle:](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle)** Resource pack features for OptiFine alternatives  
- **[Reese's Sodium Options:](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)** Better Sodium options screen  
- **[Remove Reloading Screen:](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)** Load packs in background  
- **[Shulker Box Tooltip:](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)** View shulker contents in inventory  
- **[Simple Voice Chat:](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)** Proximity voice chat  
- **[Sodium:](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** Fast rendering optimization  
- **[Sodium Extra:](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)** Adds extra features for Sodium  
- **[Sound Physics Remastered:](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)** Realistic sound propagation  
- **[Tweakeroo:](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo)** Tons of building tweaks  
- **[UniLib:](https://modrinth.com/mod/unilib)** Common utilities library 
- **[Variants-CIT:](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)** A streamlined Custom Item Textures (CIT) format with standardized item variants
- **[Visuality:](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)** Extra particles and visuals  
- **[Xaero's Minimap:](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)** Corner minimap  
- **[Xaero's World Map:](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)** Full-screen world map  
- **[YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL):](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)** Config library  
- **[Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR):](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr)** Provides default options  
- **[Zoomify:](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)** Infinite custom zoom mod

</details>
